title: Customers With Gaps In Orders
description: Find customers who have a gap of more than 30 days between any two consecutive orders.
sql_solution: SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM (SELECT *, LAG(date) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY date) prev_date FROM orders) WHERE julianday(date) - julianday(prev_date) > 30;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

gap_window = Window.partitionBy("customer_id").orderBy(to_date(col("date")))

result = (
    orders.withColumn("prev_date", lag("date").over(gap_window))
    .filter(datediff(to_date(col("date")), to_date(col("prev_date"))) > 30)
    .select("customer_id")
    .distinct()
)
